types.name: Future Perfect
types.usage: Actions completed before a future time

types.name: Future Perfect Continuous
types.formula: Subject + will have been + V1+ing + Object
types.usage: Duration of action up to a future point

sentences.nativeText: इस समय कल वह पढ़ रहा होगा।
sentences.englishText: He will be studying at this time tomorrow.

sentences.nativeText: We will be traveling next week.
sentences.englishText: We will be traveling next week.

sentences.nativeText: अगले साल तक मैं अपनी पढ़ाई पूरी कर चुका हूँगा।
sentences.englishText: I will have completed my studies by next year.
sentences.formula: Subject + will have + V3 + by + Time

sentences.nativeText: By 2030, I will have been working here for 10 years.
sentences.englishText: By 2030, I will have been working here for 10 years.
sentences.formula: By + Time + Subject + will have been + V1+ing
